name: Lime and Hot Pepper Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy sauce, lime peel, lime juice, and hot pepper sauce in a bowl.
2. Place 4 chicken breasts without skin into a large plastic bag.
3. Pour the remaining sauce mixture (lime juice, hot pepper sauce) over the chicken in the bag.
4. Add 1/3 cup of vegetable oil to the bag with the chicken.
5. Press out any excess air from the bag and seal it securely.
6. Turn the bag over several times to coat the chicken evenly.
7. Refrigerate for 30 minutes, turning the bag occasionally during this time.
8. Meanwhile, blend the remaining sauce mixture (lime juice, hot pepper sauce) with oil in a small bowl using a fork until well combined.
9. Line a platter with lettuce leaves.
10. Remove the chicken from the marinade and broil for 7 minutes on each side.
11. Arrange the chicken over the lettuce on the platter.
12. Drizzle the remaining dressing evenly over the chicken and serve.
